fields.name: Tacos al Pastor
fields.description: Marinated pork on a vertical spit, served with pineapple, cilantro, onion and salsa on soft corn tortillas.

fields.name: Tamales Oaxaqueños
fields.description: Steamed masa dough filled with mole negro and chicken, wrapped in banana leaves. A festive Mexican staple.

fields.name: Chiles en Nogada
fields.description: Poblano chiles stuffed with a savory-sweet picadillo, topped with walnut cream sauce, pomegranate seeds and parsley.

fields.name: Tlayuda con Tasajo
fields.description: Large crispy tortilla from Oaxaca spread with black beans, asiento, Oaxacan cheese and dried beef strips.

fields.name: Pozole Rojo
fields.description: Hearty hominy soup in a rich red chile broth with pork, topped with shredded cabbage, radish, oregano and lime.

fields.name: Enchiladas Verdes
fields.description: Corn tortillas filled with chicken and bathed in a tangy tomatillo salsa verde, topped with crema and fresh cheese.
